transcript: Speaker A: I have taught English for 9 years. So here, how to achieve fluency in 2 weeks. No smart people ever joined English classes. They learned by practicing. If you're afraid to speak in English, your confidence is very low. But just 7 days of practice with the AI assistance, you can activate your brain. So use MySivi AI application every day to improve your English. This AI makes you learn English without any difficulties. Confidence won't come if you're stuck practicing it alone. You need to speak with people. This MySivi app lets you talk with strangers worldwide. Speak daily, your fear will disappear. This application has everything: lessons, quizzes, and practical exercises. Practice smartly with MySivi and unlock your confidence in just 2 weeks. Install MySivi app and start improving your fluency.

summary: The presenter explains that fluency is achieved through practice rather than traditional classes. He introduces the MySivi AI app, which offers AI-guided practice and global conversation partners to overcome the fear of speaking. The CTA encourages downloading the app to build confidence in two weeks.
